name: Chicken Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken breasts in half and place in the slow cooker.
2. Cover with water and add celery, onion, salt, and peppercorns.
3. Set on low and cook for 5-6 hours.
4. When chicken is cooked throughly, remove and let cool.
5. Cut into chunks or shred.
6. Cook dried pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
7. In a large bowl, combine cooked pasta, shredded chicken, oil, sesame oil, soy sauce, rice vinegar, sugar, pepper, ground ginger, chopped parsley, sliced green onions, and fresh spinach.
8. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
9. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds.
